auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your phone and password.

credit.title: Credit History Check Required
credit.consentIntro: Before your loan can be disbursed, your bank needs to check your credit history through eCIB and Tasdeeq. This information is only shared with your partner bank and Hal.
credit.consent1: I authorize Hal and my partner bank to access my eCIB credit history
credit.consent2: I authorize access to my Tasdeeq credit score
credit.consent3: I understand this check will be logged and stored per SBP regulations
credit.otpSent: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone:
credit.otpError: Incorrect or expired OTP. Please try again.
credit.pending: Your credit check is being processed...
credit.manualReviewText: Our team is reviewing your file. We will contact you within 2 business days.

community.title: Community Verification
community.verified: Verified by your Numberdar — you're eligible to apply for a loan.
community.noneFound: No Numberdars found in your district yet.
